name: Spanish Onion Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation: thinly slice the Spanish onions and grate the potatoes.
2. Combine the Parmesan cheese separately.
3. Heat the olive oil in a heavy-based pan over medium heat.
4. Add the sliced onions to the pan and cook until tender, about 10-15 minutes.
5. Stir in the water and red wine, then simmer for 20 minutes or until the liquid has evaporated and the onions are dark-reddish brown.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together the dried rosemary, grated potatoes, yoghurt, flour, egg, and Parmesan cheese to form a dough-like mixture.
7. Add the cooked onions to the potato mixture.
8. Grease an ovenproof flan dish with olive oil and pour in the potato mixture.
9. Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top of the torte.
10. Bake at 200°C for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
11. Remove from the oven, sprinkle with parsley, then cut into wedges and serve.
